prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2023–2025年理科最低位次约6991→6222→5316，呈持续前移趋势（位次数字减小），近3年累计前移约1675名，2025年基准约5316名；本省理科 计划2023年92人、2024年93人、2025年94人，逐年小幅扩招；2026年计划74人，较2025年减少20人（缩招约21.3%），招生名额明显缩减。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双 一流高校；软科主榜2026年约第69名，近年排名从76位稳步上升至69位，学校综合实力和认可度持续提升；2022年曾出现学术不端负面事件，但2026年高考周期 内无显著声誉事件；抖音热度评价为「一般」，总排名第75位，短视频曝光量处于中等偏下水平；未见投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估中，作物学、植物保护、 畜牧学、草学获评A-，共4个A-学科，农林特色鲜明，对相关专业报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电气工程、电子信息等工科专业社会热度持续偏高；农 林类相关专业热度一般；本省2026年考生总数约23.8万（不确定），较2025年约7.65万大幅增长，竞争显著加剧，2025年理科本科一批421分；该校位于陕西（邻省），在新疆招生占比约0.9%–1.1%，招生人数较少但稳定；本省考生对邻省985高校认可度较高。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续前移趋势、2026年理科 计划明显缩招（-21.3%）、本省考生总数大幅增长（竞争加剧）以及学校排名稳步上升等因素，缩招与考生增加两因素对冲后竞争总体加剧。，结 合考生规模暴增和学校层次提升，预测2026年理科最低位次约4837名，区间4337–5337名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2023 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Science was approximately 6991 → 6222 → 5316, showing a continuous forward trend (decreasing ranking number), with a cumulative forward movement of about 1675 places over the past 3 years, and a baseline of about 5316 in 2025; the provincial Science enrollment plan was 92 in 2023, 93 in 2024, and 94 in 2025, with a slight annual expansion; the 2026 plan is 74, a decrease of 20 from 2025 (a reduction of about 21.3%), indicating a significant reduction in enrollment slots.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 69th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with a steady rise from 76th in recent years, continuously improving comprehensive strength and recognition; there was a negative academic misconduct incident in 2022, but no significant reputation events during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle; Douyin popularity evaluation is 'average', ranked 75th overall, with short video exposure at a medium-low level; no records of admission gaps; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Crop Science, Plant Protection, Animal Science, and Grassland Science were rated A-, with a total of 4 A- disciplines, featuring distinct agricultural and forestry characteristics, which have some appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, and Electronic Information have consistently high social popularity; agricultural and forestry-related majors have average popularity; the total number of examinees in the province in 2026 is about 238,000 (uncertain), a significant increase from about 76,500 in 2025, leading to intensified competition; the 2025 Science undergraduate first batch line is 421 points; the university is located in Shaanxi (neighboring province), with a recruitment proportion in Xinjiang of about 0.9%–1.1%, with a small but stable number of recruits; local examinees have a high recognition of neighboring province 985 universities.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous forward trend in historical rankings, the significant reduction in the 2026 Science enrollment plan (-21.3%), the substantial increase in the number of local examinees (intensified competition), and the steady rise in the university's ranking, the offsetting effects of enrollment reduction and increased examinees lead to overall intensified competition. Combined with the surge in examinee numbers and the improvement in the university's level, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for Science in 2026 will be approximately 4837, with a range of 4337–5337.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 4337–5337, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<4337), you can focus on competitive engineering majors such as Electrical Engineering and Computer Science; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>5337), it is advisable to prioritize Tier 3 agricultural and forestry majors to ensure admission.
